name: Officially quitting
description:
Well..hello guys. Not sure how to even explain this but yeah, I'm quitting. I PRIVATED all of my bots and I will explain why it's officially the end.

Ever since I saw Kaaties post I felt EXTREMELY bad. Since I knew this was about this toxic fanbase, Over sexualizing, content farms, and many more, and I as much as I don't want to admit it, I was apart of the "Sexualizing" part of the fandom. And I feel REALLY bad. Kaatie deserves a break. She is a human too and I hate how the fandom doesn't understand that.

I just feel like this decision is right cuz I respect Kaaaties decisions and choices and if quitting. It will make this fandom less toxic. But if you guys want. I will post only FLUFF and ANGST bots I have made and it will be "LIMITED"

Thank you. Thank you guys so much for being there. For always making me feel good. For looking up to me as their idol even if my bots weren't as good as many more creators. For just using my bots often or once. Thank you for accepting me into the fpe fandom. But most of all. Thank you, thank you for being there..

S0me0ne signing off :))
creator: S0me0ne.
